title: Crispy Tofu Pita Sandwich
description: A crispy tofu pita sandwich filled with savory delights, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 2. Slice the tofu into thin strips and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
3. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Bake the tofu in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy.
5. Meanwhile, toast the pita bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for 5-7 minutes.
6. Spread a layer of crunchy delight on the bottom half of the pita.
7. Add the crispy tofu on top of the delight.
8. Place the other half of the pita on top to complete the sandwich.
